title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10807 OR AN ACT DECLARING A WORKING HOLIDAY AND NO CLASS DAY IN SCHOOLS IN THE CITY OF PARAÃAQUE, METRO MANILA IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION DAY ANNIVERSARY

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 47, 13151 (November 25, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11460, September 05, 2019 ]

AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10807 OR AN ACT DECLARING A WORKING HOLIDAY AND NO CLASS DAY IN SCHOOLS IN THE CITY OF PARAÃAQUE, METRO MANILA IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION DAY ANNIVERSARY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 1 of Republic Act No. 10807 is hereby amended:

"SECTION 1. February 13 of every year is declared a special working holiday and no class day in schools in the City of Parañaque, Metro Manila in commemoration of its foundation day anniversary. Upon proclamation of the President, February 13 of every year shall be a special nonworking holiday in the City of Parañaque."

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on September 10, 2018, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 3, 2019, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on June 4, 2019.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: SEP 05 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
